case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHARIKA JONES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAY-08-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, SHARIKA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1872 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134; COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
